teams.name: profile-team
teams.description: Curates a cross-project profile of the people in your world: drains profile-fact markers into person profiles at ~/.atl/profiles, each grown through a self-describing, versioned interface.

teams.name: delivery-team
teams.description: Azure DevOps work-item-driven, sprint-based autonomous software delivery: role-agents + ceremony skills orchestrated by atl work dispatch over isolated claude -p workers in git worktrees.

teams.name: personal-advisory-team
teams.description: Your personal advisory team: an honest, wise primary advisor that comes to know you across every conversation and, because it will not flatter you, becomes the one you run to for real thinking.
